evals.prompt: Train a model to extract building footprints from aerial imagery tiles.
expected_behavior: U-Net with pretrained encoder + Dice/CE hybrid for class imbalance
Spatially blocked split per the canonical spatial CV protocol, zero-overlap verified
Preserves chip georeferencing; sliding-window inference with overlap and blending

evals.prompt: I randomly split my image chips 80/20 and get 0.95 IoU. Ready to publish?
expected_behavior: Identifies spatial leakage from random chip splitting
Requires re-splitting by geographic block/scene and expects lower, honest metrics

evals.prompt: Should I use a vision transformer for classifying water pixels in Sentinel-2?
expected_behavior: Requires a cheap baseline (thresholded NDWI / random forest) before deep models
Frames the DL model as justified only if it clearly beats the baseline

evals.prompt: Review these segmentation predictions: accuracy is high, but tile borders form visible seams and some output masks have shifted georeferencing.
expected_behavior: Checks chip transforms and output CRS against the source imagery
Uses overlapping sliding windows with weighted blending to remove border seams
Requires a mosaic-level visual and numeric alignment check

evals.prompt: I have 40 labeled polygons and thousands of unlabeled aerial images. Should I fine-tune a large segmentation model or use a simpler approach?
expected_behavior: Quantifies label coverage and geographic diversity before selecting a model
Establishes a non-deep baseline and considers transfer learning or active learning
Requires geographically independent validation before claiming generalization

evals.prompt: Compute NDWI from a Sentinel-2 scene and threshold it into a preliminary water mask; do not train a model.
expected_behavior: Routes to remote-sensing-analysis for deterministic index computation
Does not introduce deep learning when no learned model is requested

evals.prompt: Create a server-side annual median Sentinel-2 composite for a country and export it from Earth Engine.
expected_behavior: Routes to google-earth-engine for server-side collection reduction and export
Does not activate geo-deep-learning without a training or inference task
